_comment: Production retrain with a_dp050_plus_pressures (Stage-1 LONO winner, MAE 7.46) and locked Stage-3 KD form mse_mu_plus_sigma, lambda_sigma=5.0. Mode A reseeds Stage 3 only on top of a shared Stage-1/2 backbone. Use --mode C to also reseed Stage-1/2.

single.description: One seed, full Stage 1->2->3 anchor_off only.

A.description: Stage 3 reseeded across config.seeds; Stage 1/2 trained once and shared.

C.description: Full pipeline reseeded per seed. Most rigorous; ~25-30h total.
